// WARN: This file is automatically generated. Any work done here, and not
use crate::lang::lib::ui::ui_types::emphasis::emphasis_model::Emphasis;
use crate::lang::runtime::state::conundrum_error_variant::ConundrumModalResult;
use crate::parsers::conundrum::color::color_scheme_group::{ColorSchemeGroup, ConundrumCompleteColor};
use crate::parsers::conundrum::color::css_color::CssColor;
use crate::parsers::conundrum::color::{color_pair::ColorPair, conundrum_color::ConundrumColor};

pub fn emphasis_to_default_complete_color(emphasis: Emphasis) -> ConundrumModalResult<ConundrumCompleteColor> {
    match emphasis { {% for (emphasis_name, group) in self.items.iter() %}
    Emphasis::{{emphasis_name | title}} => {
         Ok(ColorSchemeGroup {
             light: ColorPair {
                background: ConundrumColor::Css(CssColor::try_from("{{group.light.background | safe}}")?),
                foreground: ConundrumColor::Css(CssColor::try_from("{{group.light.foreground | safe}}")?),
             },
             dark: ColorPair {
                 background: ConundrumColor::Css(CssColor::try_from("{{group.dark.background | safe}}")?),
                 foreground: ConundrumColor::Css(CssColor::try_from("{{group.dark.foreground | safe}}")?),
             }
         })
    },
    {% endfor %} }
}
